signals.text: Active weekly sync cadence with 3 meetings in last 30 days (Mar 16, Mar 25, Apr 7)
Kick-Off Call completed Mar 9 with Lindsey Shin -- onboarding is actively in progress
Apr 7 sync covered design feedback: typography hierarchy, CTA optimization, target launch that week
FERMAT metrics API unavailable -- cannot verify platform activity or revenue generation
Templates and Wireframes work block scheduled today (Apr 15) for 2 landing page templates and influencer wireframes
May product launch planned with influencer/UGC content integration discussed in weekly syncs
Danielle Finn declined the Apr 7 weekly sync invite -- potential stakeholder disengagement

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT|| Kick-Off Call
recent.summary: Kick-off onboarding call. Discussed platform setup, landing page templates for best-performing ads and UGC creators. Lindsey wants to optimize Ctetra Advanced campaigns with dedicated FERMAT landing pages. May product launch with influencer content integration planned. Technical/scoping topics covered.

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT | Platform Demo
recent.summary: Platform demo with Lindsey and Monika (Head of Digital). Covered funnel builder, DPP, pricing discussion. Competitive mentions of Replo and Shogun. Objections raised around ROI and business case needs. Executive (Head of Digital) present on the call.

recent.title: Catch-up: Medik8 + FERMAT | Follow-up Call
recent.participants: Mukul Varshney (mukul@fermatcommerce.com), Lindsey Shin (lindsey.shin@medik8.com), Danielle Finn (danielle.finn@medik8.com)
recent.summary: Lindsey re-engaged indicating an internal deadline of May to adopt an experimentation platform. Mentioned competitors Replo and Shogun. Mukul demonstrated funnel builder with gift-with-purchase functionality and branding customization. Lindsey requested a business case/ROI calculator for internal budget approval and pricing.
action_items: Send follow-up email with pricing information
Include preview links for demo funnels in recap email
Create ROI calculator/business case for Medik8
Schedule follow-up demo with Lindsey and Head of Digital Monica
Prepare comparison of FERMAT vs Replo and Shogun

calls.analysis: Medik8 has been actively engaged through the sales and onboarding process with 3 recorded Glyphic calls since February. The kick-off call (Mar 9) transitioned them to post-sale onboarding. Weekly sync meetings continued through Granola (Mar 16, Mar 25, Apr 7) covering platform setup, branding alignment, and landing page development for a May product launch.

email.analysis: Email activity is primarily automated (Zoom join notifications, Glyphic call summaries, Medik8 marketing emails). The Loom video 'Medik8 Checkout Flow' was viewed on Apr 8, suggesting active work on their checkout experience. Danielle Finn declined the Apr 7 sync but Nidhi accepted the Apr 14 one, indicating continued internal FERMAT team engagement. No direct brand-to-CSM substantive email threads found in last 14 days.
